top_signals.title: U.S. completes latest round of strikes against Iran, while Tehran targets Gulf neighbors
top_signals.summary: The U.S. has completed a third consecutive night of strikes against Iran, as Tehran targets U.S. military facilities in the region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Vanadium awarded gov’t offtake contract for National Defense Stockpile
top_signals.summary: The company operates two facilities in Arkansas that recover and process vanadium from petroleum refining.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s 20-Year Bond Sale Demand Stronger Than 12-Month Average
top_signals.summary: Japan’s 20-year government bond auction Tuesday saw stronger demand than the 12-month average as elevated yields underpinned buying.

top_signals.title: Galway’s New Brunswick gold resource misses analyst forecast
top_signals.summary: Last month, Red Cloud Securities forecast the overall new resource could approach 3 million oz. gold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
